evidence: EVM IR permits Unit entrypoint returns and rejects Unit let bindings through lowerStatement diagnostics.

U32 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words with dispatcher range guards; scalar U32 storage is accepted by validateState.
U64 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words; Counter IR covers scalar U64 storage and return values.
Hash literals, Hash ABI parameters, Hash returns, and hash construction currently fail with explicit EVM IR v0 diagnostics.

EVM target profile rejects storage.array until fixed array storage layout lowering is implemented.
